race.comment: PRINCE IS GAME (7) goes well on the home track and will find this more to his liking after fading to run seventh over 2100m at Wyong in BM64 class. On the quick back-up and gets through the going. Hard to stop. IT'S NOT OVER (8) disappointed last time out at Tuncurry finishing sixth when stretching out to 2105m. Fitter now third-up and has the talent to test some of these. Each-way. IN ISO (5) proven at the trip and on the quick back-up after he finished seventh over 1500m at Muswellbrook. This looks easier and adept in all conditions. FARRAIGE (10) recent form sound and he gets a better set-up here. Struggled with the 59kg in the heavy conditions when fourth over 2018m at this track. Expected to take a hand in the finish on the quick turnaround.
